summary: Register the hand-authored `sync potential` subcommand on the generated sync command, and wire the local potential store into all six novel report commands.
reason: Potential ratings are only reachable via a bundled offline dataset (sofifa/fifacm are Cloudflare-walled; EA drop-api has no potential). The generated sync.go and novel command constructors must be extended to load and consume that store.
validated_outcome: sync potential loads 18166 rows (June 2025 sofifa); player schjelderup shows potential 84; potential-gap/wonderkids rank on real potential.
